action.reasoning: Observation: the new DINO 4e seed-123 standalone checkpoint is a new best at 0.6281, with very different class behavior: much stronger bobcat/cat/empty but much weaker bird/dog/opossum than the previous 4e/10e ensemble. Analysis: this complementarity is ideal for ensembling, and likely higher-value than more training. Before creating an ensemble checkpoint, inspect the existing ensemble checkpoint format and predict.py ensemble-loading assumptions to avoid breaking the working path. Decision: run a lightweight inspection of checkpoint metadata/keys and relevant predict.py ensemble code, then submit a 3-model ensemble next iteration.
